title: Chicken Citrus Pasta
description: A Thai-inspired pasta dish with grilled chicken, citrus-marinated sauce, and a sprinkle of pickled ginger.

ingredients.name: citrus
ingredients.notes: juice and zest of 1 lime, 1 lemon

instructions: 2. In a blender or food processor, combine citrus juice, zest, soy sauce, garlic, and 1 tablespoon olive oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Season chicken breast with salt and pepper. Grill for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
5. In a large skillet, heat remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat.
6. Add sliced veggies and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
7. Add citrus marinade and stir to combine.
8. Add grilled chicken and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Toss cooked pasta in the skillet with chicken and veggie mixture.
10. Serve hot, garnished with pickled ginger and sesame seeds (optional).
